name: myfav/zweideh
description: Implementation of the fancy product designer in shopware.

description.de-DE: Integriert den Fancy Product Designer in den Shopware Store. Der Fancy Product Designer ist eine Frontend-App, die es deinen Kunden erlaubt, individuelle Produkte zu gestalten.
description.en-GB: Integrates the fancy product designer into the shopware 6 store. The fancy product designer is a frontend app, that allows your customers to design custom products.
